content:
Instructor introduces misinformation, forcing students to fact-check, challenge, or “decode” the lecture.


✅ Why This Works
• Ties the instructor’s presence directly to literary themes.
• Prevents passive listening by making students actively engage with how they receive information.
• Teaches students how perception, authority, and framing affect storytelling and truth.

📜 5. XP Economy: Final Changes & Hidden Uses

📜 XP can now be spent in the final week, creating a structured economy.

How XP Can Be Used

✔ Participation Boosts – Spend XP to increase past discussion grades.
✔ Extended Research Time – Spend XP for a 48-hour final paper extension.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 146 (chunk 146/555)
